reviews.name: Robert Alvarez
reviews.text: I've worked with Dustin and Nimbus Roofing on three different roofing jobs for clients through my real estate company, and I can confidently say they're one of the best in the business.

reviews.name: Robyn Kramer
reviews.text: Last year I had my roof replaced by Nimbus Roofing, and we couldn't be more pleased with the results. From start to finish, the experience was smooth, professional, and stress-free. Working with Dustin and his team gave me the confidence to recommend them to anyone.

reviews.name: John Coffman
reviews.text: Dustin inspected my roof after a big hail storm. Provided a well documented report including pictures with the write up. All of this and they recommended NOT to replace my roof. In a world full of shady, storm-chasing roofing companies, Dustin and Nimbus is one you can trust!

reviews.name: Freddie Newsom
reviews.text: I've used Nimbus twice for roof damage repair after a storm. They were quick to respond, had someone out to do the repairs either same day or the next day and the price was always great.

reviews.name: MARC DIRE
reviews.text: Hands down, the best experience replacing my roof. This company deserves 10 Stars. I highly recommend these guys!

reviews.name: Manu Goyal
reviews.text: Nimbus Roofing is simply the best! Dustin was incredibly responsive—within an hour of calling him, our roof was fixed. His service is top-notch, and he ensures that every concern is addressed and resolved immediately.

reviews.name: Kelly Heilbut
reviews.text: Dustin Moore with Nimbus Roofing recently replaced our roof, rain gutters, window screens and interior ceiling paint. Dustin was on top of all jobs and was easily accessible and responsive. We couldn't be happier with the quality of work.

reviews.name: Beth Lahaie
reviews.text: Dustin is a pleasure to work with, he's attentive and responsive to the needs of the homeowner. I definitely recommend Nimbus Roofing if you expect high quality service.

reviews.name: Christina Woodley
reviews.text: If you are looking for options to have your roof inspected and replaced after these Texas hail storms we've had, highly recommend our neighbor Chris Stedman and Nimbus Roofing. This was our first replacement in 17 years of home ownership and they made it so easy!

reviews.name: Yolanda Burnett
reviews.text: I will recommend Nimbus Roofing because my experience was excellent. Dustin Moore was so professional and kind. I am pleased with my roof replacement and he made the experience very pleasant.

reviews.name: Sean Boyll
reviews.text: I noticed some shingles coming off my roof after some strong winds and gave Nimbus a call. Dustin responded within 24 hours and was professional, consistent with communicating, and up front about availability given his busy schedule.

reviews.name: Diane Lewis
reviews.text: Team did a great job installing my replacement roof, thorough and professional. It came out perfect. They did a good job with worksite cleanup too at the end. Very efficient.

reviews.name: Terry Bookout
reviews.text: These guys are awesome! They explained the process to me thoroughly, gave me a quote right away, and completed the work quickly. They cleaned up afterwards and I still haven't found one nail in my yard. Thanks Dustin!!

reviews.name: David Moon
reviews.text: Working with Nimbus Roofing has been a stress-free experience both times I've used them to replace my roof after hail storms. They took care of everything, including replacing the gutters, screens, and staining the fence.

reviews.name: Emily Claiborne
reviews.text: Dustin was incredible. He was so communicative throughout the entire process. The day of installation was painless and quick - which is saying a lot since I work from home with my partner. They were done before early afternoon, and not a single nail was left in the yard.

reviews.name: Landon Moore
reviews.text: This is a top tier roofing company. I have had lots of experience with roof replacements in DFW. You want a stable company (most are not), the most experienced roofers, and for the process to be clean and fast. Nimbus has done 2 jobs for me and both were excellent.

reviews.name: Keith Gehrke
reviews.text: Dustin and Crew did an outstanding job, as an old trades guy I can say he went over and above to make sure the job site was clean and neat at all times. I have a Solar System and he took on the challenge of finding a sub and making sure the job was done right.

reviews.name: Brannan Medina
reviews.text: Their team did an excellent job. Walked me through the whole process. And left the job site clean like they weren't even there. Highly recommend them for your roofing needs!

reviews.name: Danette Jewell
reviews.text: I would highly recommend Nimbus Roofing to anyone! They were extremely professional and easy to work with. They went above and beyond to make sure no detail was overlooked and worked with our insurance to make sure it all taken care of.

reviews.name: Chris Cox
reviews.text: Great company to work with. We were impressed with the communication and high level of execution in work provided. We would work alongside Nimbus Roofing again.
